title: Add user profile endpoint — missing null check
author: junior-dev
pr_description: Adds a GET /user/{user_id}/profile endpoint that returns the user's profile information including name and email.
diff:
diff --git a/app.py b/app.py
index 1a2b3c4..5d6e7f8 100644
--- a/app.py
+++ b/app.py
@@ -8,6 +8,18 @@ from database import get_user, get_db_session
 app = FastAPI()
 
 
+@app.get("/user/{user_id}/profile")
+async def get_user_profile(user_id: int):
+    """Get user profile by ID."""
+    db = get_db_session()
+    user = get_user(db, user_id)
+    return {
+        "id": user.id,
+        "name": user.name,
+        "email": user.email,
+        "created_at": str(user.created_at)
+    }
+
 
 @app.get("/health")
 async def health_check():
file_context:
from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from database import get_user, get_db_session

app = FastAPI()


@app.get("/user/{user_id}/profile")
async def get_user_profile(user_id: int):
    """Get user profile by ID."""
    db = get_db_session()
    user = get_user(db, user_id)
    return {
        "id": user.id,
        "name": user.name,
        "email": user.email,
        "created_at": str(user.created_at)
    }


@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "ok"}

gold_issues.description: Missing null check: get_user() may return None if user_id does not exist, causing AttributeError when accessing user.name
